ringcentral._note: Create a JWT app in the RingCentral Developer Console. Grant it the ReadAccounts, ReadPresence, and ReadCallLog scopes. Generate a Personal JWT under Credentials.

lansweeper._hardwareHashFieldNote: Set to the Lansweeper custom field name that stores the Intune Autopilot hardware hash (collected via WMI MDM_DevDetail_Ext01.DeviceHardwareData). Leave null if not collected.
